triggers.action: Call archivethreadwith_email (archive_thread_with_email) to remove the thread from INBOX, then call labelthreadwith_email (label_thread_with_email) to remove the UNREAD label. Both steps are required. Add STARRED/IMPORTANT when appropriate.

text Jonathan: "what do you want to put on your github profile today?" When he replies, use his reply as the new MOTD and update the youjonathan/youjonathan repository so build_readme.py runs.

triggers.condition: Jonathan's Linq Location enters or is within about 120 meters of East Treat House at 554 Governors Ave, Stanford, CA 94305
triggers.action: When Jonathan enters or gets within range of East Treat House on Stanford campus, text him a medication check-in asking whether he has taken Prozac. If he confirms, add a row to the Notion Medication Log database with the date and time, status = Confirmed, trigger source = Dorm location nudge, location label = East Treat House, the address 554 Governors Ave, Stanford, CA 94305, and the coordinates latitude 37.4256959 and longitude -122.1785353. If he says later, text him again in 1 hour. If he says he is rushing or does not respond, text him again in 1-2 hours.

Once each day, after Jonathan's first message sent after 6:30 AM local time, text him asking whether he has taken Prozac. If he confirms, add a row to the Notion Medication Log database with the prompt time, response time, status = Confirmed, source = First text after 6:30 AM, and any relevant notes. If he says later, text him again in 1 hour. If he says he is rushing or does not respond, text him again in 1-2 hours. Also keep the same logging flow when Jonathan is near or at East Treat House (554 Governors Ave, Medford, MA 02155; latitude 42.4313501, longitude -71.1100888).
